zh: 好久不見，嘉年華！OVA《Fate/Grand Carnival》1st Season Blu-ray&DVD大好評發售中！2nd Season預計於10月13日發售！一起慶祝吧！奇蹟的嘉年華！
ja: 久しぶり、カーニバル！OVA「Fate/Grand Carnival」1st Season Blu-ray&DVD大好評発売中！2nd Seasonは10月13日に発売予定！ともに祝おう！奇跡のカーニバルを！
en: Long time no see, Carnival! OVA "Fate/Grand Carnival" 1st Season Blu-ray & DVD on sale with great acclaim! 2nd Season scheduled for release on October 13th! Let's celebrate together! The miracle Carnival!
